notes: Crashes immediately unless Wine D3D11 is enabled. The in-game main menu doesn't seem to work, so there's no way to exit the game that I can see other than by manually killing it. In all other respects, it seems to run fine.
title: Steven Universe: Save the Light

notes: I've played this game a little more, and it still seems to work fine except for the bug where the buttons in the pause menu don't work -- they just return you to the game without doing anything. This is mostly an annoyance when trying to exit the game. If you have the same issue, I recommend using Alt+F4 to quit as a workaround. Unlike what I was doing before (switching to a virtual terminal and manually killing processes), this will shut down the game cleanly. There is an autosave feature, so the game remains fairly playable despite this bug.
title: Steven Universe: Save the Light
